Endorsement States

46

Requires a separate board application with fee and processing time.

State Timeline Difficulty Fee
Alabama 2 to 4 Weeks Med $250 Alaska 4 to 6 Weeks Low $150 Arkansas 2 to 4 Weeks Low $110 Connecticut 4 to 6 Weeks Low $190 Delaware 3 to 5 Weeks Med $235 District of Columbia ~3–5 Weeks Med $229 Florida 30 days (initial review) Med $165 Georgia 15 to 20 Business Days Med $85 Hawaii 4 to 6 Weeks Med $225 Idaho 3 to 4 Weeks Med $100 Illinois 4 to 6 Weeks Med $100 Indiana 2 to 4 Weeks Med $20 Iowa 3 to 4 Weeks Med $120 Kansas 3 to 4 Weeks Med $140 Kentucky 2 to 4 Weeks Med $50 Louisiana 4 to 6 Weeks Med $100 Maine 3 to 5 Weeks Med $171 Maryland 4 to 6 Weeks Med $300 Massachusetts 4 to 6 Weeks Med $196 Minnesota 2 to 4 Weeks Med $282 Mississippi 3 to 4 Weeks High $100 Missouri 2 to 4 Weeks Med $50 Montana 3 to 5 Weeks Low $75 Nebraska 4 to 6 Weeks Low $114 Nevada 4 to 6 Weeks Med $237 New Hampshire 2 to 4 Weeks Med $110 New Jersey TBD (Regulations Pending) Low $200 New Mexico Varies (~2 Weeks) Med $200 New York ~6 Weeks Med $294 North Carolina 2 to 3 Business Days Med $248 North Dakota 2 to 4 Weeks Med $75 Ohio ~2 Weeks Med $228 Oklahoma 4 to 6 Weeks Med $120 Oregon 3 to 4 Weeks Med $110 Pennsylvania 4 to 8 Weeks Med $95 Rhode Island 3 to 5 Weeks Low $75 South Carolina 4 to 6 Weeks Med $175 South Dakota 3 to 4 Weeks Low $70 Tennessee 4 to 6 Weeks Med $140 Texas 2 to 4 Weeks High $142 Utah 2 to 4 Weeks Low $60 Vermont 2 to 4 Weeks Low $100 Washington 4 to 6 Weeks Med $81 West Virginia 2 to 4 Weeks Med $69 Wisconsin 2 to 4 Weeks Med $60 Wyoming 1 to 2 Weeks Low $200

CDR States

5

No state license required — national CDR credential only.

State Timeline Difficulty Fee
Arizona No state app None — California No state app None — Colorado No state app None — Michigan No state app None — Virginia No state app None —

Try adjusting your search or clearing your filters.

How to use this directory

Use the path filter to focus on endorsement or CDR states. Sort by fee or difficulty to find your fastest or most practical route. Open any state for board-verified steps, documents, and renewal details.
